Early Access

JustGo Health Canada and USA.

We're still early, and that's the best part. Join the early adopters shaping Lock In 3.0 — the smartest version we've built yet. It's powered by the campus mental health programs that actually move the needle.

Yale University

Breaking the Barrier.

Yale's program tears down the stigma that keeps students silent. We baked that same openness into how Lock In gets you talking before things pile up.

Harvard University

We're All Human.

Harvard's program is built on one truth: everybody struggles, nobody's alone. Lock In carries that energy, so reaching out feels normal, not heavy.

MIT

Active Minds.

MIT's student-led Active Minds runs campus-wide wellness screening and peer outreach. That screening-first, peer-powered approach is the backbone of Lock In 3.0.

Want in early? Reach out

Emailearlyaccess@justgo.health
Call Dr. Obed+1 (303) 555-0142
JustGo Health
scroll to explore ↓

Privacy

The God's Eye Policy

Real talk: everything you drop here stays between you and God. Not us, not anybody. No one peeks at your stuff without your say-so. That's a promise, and here's how we keep it locked:

01

No Google. No Apple. No middleman.

We don't trust the big tech guys with your business, so there's no "sign in with Google or Apple" here. Just you.

02

Screenshots? Blocked.

Nobody screenshots this app. Not your nosy friend, not even you. It's airtight in here.

03

Built dark on purpose.

The whole app stays dark so nobody can read it over your shoulder. Privacy, even in public.

04

You're Locked In.

This is LOCKED IN for real. You hold the keys, you call the shots. Only you.

When you're ready, you pick which doctor, hospital, or clinic gets to see what. And even then? We'll ask if you're sure. Twice.
